creator: tomaz.borstnar@over.net
text:
Postgresql's latest version is 6.5.3 and for some time postgresql-6.5.2.tar.gz is no longer avaliable on mirrors, but just patch file to upgrade. 
I submited report ports/15034 for changing version to 6.5.3 about a month ago, but it is still open, but now one can't use postgresql port due to unavaliable dist file.

Fix: 

Update version to 6.5.3.
How-To-Repeat: Just try to install the port.
